• 3D match-3 puzzle game with voxel-style blocks that swaps to create matches
  • Features art importer that converts images into playable puzzle levels with color-coded blocks
  • Dynamic background fluid effects that change colors based on the current level's palette
  • Includes win screen with export/share functionality and particle explosion effects
    const CHAR_TO_COLOR = { 'r': { hex: 0xFF3333, rgb: {r:255, g:51, b:51} }, ... };
    class Block { constructor(x, y, charKey, powerupType = 'none') { ... } }

A WebGL-based match-3 game featuring 3D voxel blocks, an image-to-level converter, and dynamic fluid backgrounds that adapt to each level's color palette. The game includes power-ups, particle effects, and export/share functionality for completed levels.
